title: NIA Attaches Properties of Jaish-e-Mohammad Operative in 2017 CRPF Fidayeen Attack Case
description: The action was taken under Section 33(1) of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967, following fresh orders issued by the NIA Special Court in Jammu. Officials described it as a major step towards dismantling the financial backbone of terror outfits active in the Union Territory.
